nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as author replacing human writing
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to rewrite emails, summaries, and similar shorter-form documents. In other words, AI is my editor.

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere executor without creative input
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to bounce ideas off of someone to test for their realizability

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and need for fact-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I also always double-check crucial data points like time/date, etc.

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.grounding_span: my AI tools aren't connected across data domains is a source of immense frustration

nodes.label: AI involvement in actual making process
nodes.label_negative: AI as domain expert requiring deep knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I just need a structural agent instead of in-depth domain expertise to help guide my writing

nodes.label: AI as tool for generating visual and video elements
nodes.grounding_span: I usually trust that the graphic truly represents the data underlying it, because I make only simple graphics with AI

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.label_negative: Workplace cultural constraints on AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: My cultural environment constrains my access to relevant tools

nodes.label: AI for rote and time-consuming tasks
nodes.grounding_span: We spend lots of manpower doing rote processes based on multiple known variables, which should be done by AI

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: optimize the effectiveness of the message

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: not an effective use of limited time

nodes.label: Trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: validate for accuracy, relevance, and reliable sourcing

nodes.label: Seamless workflow integration

nodes.label: Innovation and creating new knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: encounter new ideas that AI augments and helps generate

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: AI summarization of conversations we have is virtually flawless

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration

nodes.label: Cautious trust with verification
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to collaborate with AI rather than blindly trust

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm ready for the promise to become actualized

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: Then we engage in a back-and-forth conversation on its version versus mine
